name: Suspicious File Extraction via Expand Detected
description: Detects the use of the `expand.exe` process to extract files from potentially suspicious locations or with suspicious parameters. Adversaries may use this to download or copy malicious files.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'expand.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the expand.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute expand.exe, including suspicious arguments related to CAB files and target paths.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which expand.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
